title: The Wildebeest Mod
description: Wildebeests in Minecraft, and a few other things.
body:
![The Wildebeest Mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/29a2bf1e7d7c1bc849bd0d6b86cadb4d6124e460.png)

![A wildebeest attacks a cow](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fff7c97419f17c748c0ac2f41ab9d2ff6d72f90c.png)

## About

The Wildebeest Mod brings wildebeest mobs to Minecraft (no joke?). Encounter these well-known animals in savanna biomes (or wooded badlands) and discover their strength, their dislike of cows, and their willingness to remain in the herd.

The mod also adds several new items and blocks, such as wildebeest meat, a new high-performance bow, and even a powerful potion.

## Installation

* ⏩ Requires **NeoForge** to be installed: https://neoforged.net/.
* ⏩ Copy the jar file of the mod in the "Mods" folder.
* ⏩ For each version, check in the changelog the supported/tested versions of Minecraft and Neoforge.

## Features

### The Wildebeests
* Very resistant and can cause serious injury
* Not affected by vanilla knockback
* Spawn in Savana and Wooded Badlands
* Herd Goal
    * The wildebeests will seek to stay together
    * Lone wildebeests will seek to join a nearby herd
* Attack cows
* Attack any entity that attacks it
    * The nearby wildebeests will also attack the assailant
    * Important follow range
* Drop Raw Wildebeest and sometimes Wildebeest Horns
    * Like all mobs, dying by fire will cause them to drop Cooked Wildebeest
    * Looting enchantments can help you obtain more Wildebeest Horns
* Eat grass
    * For pleasure
    * Babies grow faster when they eat
* Eat bush
    * They make babies after eating them

### Blocks
* Wildebeest Horn Block, Stairs and Slab
  * High resistance like Obsidian
  * Requires at least a diamond pickaxe to be harvested
  * Can be crafted (see Recipes section)

### Items
* Damaged Wildebeest Tuft
  * Can be harvested from wildebeests using shears
* Wildebeest Tuft
  * Can be harvested from wildebeests using shears
  * Can be crafted (see Recipes section)
* Wildebeest Charge Potion (classic, splash and ligering)
    * Confers the “Wildebeest Charge” effect 
      * Same recoil as when wildebeests charge entities
      * +3 attack damage and +0.8 attack knockback
    * Can be made (see Recipes section)
* Raw Wildebeest
  * Retores 4 hunger points
  * Can be harvested by killing wildebeests
* Cooked Wildebeest
  * Restores 9 hunger points
  * Takes a little time to cook
* Wildebeest Horn
  * Can be harvested by killing wildebeests
* Wildebeest Bow
  * Durability of 128
  * Powerful recoil effect upon impact (slightly greater recoil effect than the "Wildebeest Charge" effect)
  * Can be repaired like all tools
* Wildebeest Spawn Egg
  * Available in Creative Mod only
